name: tomato pesto pasta
notes: Basil is non-optional or else the dish will be underwhelming. Pine nuts are too rich for tomato paste blends — the combination becomes a comfort-food bomb that buries the tomato. Almonds and sunflower seeds are the right nut/seed pairing for a red pesto (see nuts-and-seeds article: almonds anchor red pestos, pine nuts anchor green ones).
